meaning: n.移居美国的南欧黑肤人
examples: He drives a vintage Cadillac and inserts 1950s doo-wop tunes into his build-a-border-fence fulminations.
He sang with doo-wop groups on the street corner in his Brooklyn neighborhood at an early age.
In his spare time, Mr. Barry began writing songs for a doo-wop group he formed called the Tarrytones.
